behavior_summary: Provides the short 'U8P_ODISTAT::look' (examine) response for this object/NPC: when the player uses the U8P_ODISTAT::look/examine verb the script emits a single short bark.
Chooses between two short barks based on the global flag ancientOnesMet: if true it barks 'Odion', otherwise it barks 'male statue '.
After emitting the chosen bark the process calls suspend to terminate/pause the U8P_ODISTAT::look handler; there are no side effects or global flag writes.
notable_control_flow: Single conditional branch: test the global flag ancientOnesMet and select one of two barks accordingly.
Deterministic end-of-flow: each branch emits a bark and then calls suspend to end the process.
open_questions: Is the trailing space in the alternative bark text 'male statue ' significant (formatting artifact) or intentional?
Where and when is the global flag ancientOnesMet set elsewhere in game code (which events gate the alternate description)?
The original disassembly contains several Unknown nodes — do they ever add timing/animation or side effects that aren't exposed in the high-level JSON?

main_function.name: U8P_ODISTAT::look
main_function.purpose: Handle the player's examine/U8P_ODISTAT::look action for this object/NPC and display a short descriptive bark dependent on game state.
entry_conditions: Triggered by the engine when the player examines or 'looks at' this object/NPC (process type 0x0208).
Actively uses the global guard ancientOnesMet to choose which short description to present.

function_map.name: U8P_ODISTAT::look
function_map.role: examine/U8P_ODISTAT::look handler that selects and emits a short bark based on game state

function_map.name: suspend
function_map.role: engine call used to terminate/pause the process after emitting the bark

external_calls.purpose: Terminate or pause the U8P_ODISTAT::look process after producing the bark/description.

reads.name: ancientOnesMet
reads.likely_effect: Guards which short description is shown when examined; true => 'Odion', false => 'male statue '.

quick_facts.behavior_summary_one_liner: Provides the short 'U8P_ODISTAT::look' (examine) response for this object/NPC: when the player uses the U8P_ODISTAT::look/examine verb the script emits a single short bark.
